svg.text: Sheet B: IF Input + Protection + Bias — Signal Flow
HP corner: 1/(2π × 47k × 100nF) = 33.9 Hz (3× below 100 Hz IF floor)
R_IN current limit: 5V / 200Ω = 25 mA (below PGA abs max)
ESD protection: ±15 kV HBM, 0.5 pF added capacitance
Signal loss through R_IN: < 0.002% (200Ω vs 10MΩ PGA input Z)
Sheet C: PGA + Anti-Alias Filter — Signal Flow
Sheet D: FDA Driver + ADC + SPI Interface — Signal Flow
10k pull-ups on CS_ADC, CS_PGA, SDO to 3V3D
Target PGA output: ~1.0 Vpp SE → 2.0 Vpp diff
J_ADC_DIRECT: inject signal directly into ADC
